name: generate-punditry
description: GCP Cloud Function to trigger daily AI punditry generation

scripts.deploy: gcloud functions deploy generate-punditry --runtime nodejs20 --trigger-http --allow-unauthenticated --entry-point generatePunditry --set-env-vars VERCEL_URL=$VERCEL_URL,CRON_SECRET=$CRON_SECRET,TOURNAMENT_SLUG=$TOURNAMENT_SLUG
